description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a moderately thick bezel. The bezel is matte black and has sharp, angular corners, giving the monitor a modern and utilitarian appearance. The screen is supported by a geometric, polygonal stand that flares outward at the base, providing stability and a distinctive visual profile. The rear of the monitor is plain, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding, and the side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the angular design of the stand. The surface finish is smooth and hard, typical of plastic and glass construction. No decorative elements, logos, or control buttons are visible on any side.
description: A modern, matte black computer monitor with a rectangular screen, thick bezel, and angular stand. The design is sleek and minimal, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat display, thick matte bezel, and the polygonal stand base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the monitor and the angular, flared stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back panel with no visible ports, buttons, or logos.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the geometric stand shape.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with sharp, angular corners and no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a polygonal, flared pedestal base with angular lines, made of matte black plastic or metal, and shows no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
